name: Sara Lee Corporation
description: The Sara Lee Corporation was a prominent American consumer-goods company headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois. Known for its diverse portfolio of frozen and packaged foods, the company gained widespread recognition for its iconic slogan, "Everybody doesn't like something, but nobody doesn't like Sara Lee." Originally established as Consolidated Foods Corporation, it adopted the Sara Lee name in 1985. Following several strategic spin-offs and divestments, the corporation was effectively dissolved in 2012, with its various business units integrated into other major food companies, including Tyson Foods and the entity that became Jacobs Douwe Egberts.
